title: is_some_and() usage is correct for MSRV 1.80
description: The lexer uses .is_some_and(|&c| ...) in multiple places (lexer.rs lines 60, 148, 156, 166, 201, 235). This method was stabilized in Rust 1.70. The MSRV is 1.80. A reviewer might flag this as too new and suggest the older .map(|c| ...).unwrap_or(false) pattern. That suggestion is incorrect: is_some_and is well within MSRV, it is more readable, and avoids the unnecessary Option::map allocation of the older idiom. The is_some_and usage is idiomatic for Rust 1.70+.
